title: IdempotencyKeyInput
description: Inputs for the deterministic idempotency-key generator. runId / nodeId are normally read from ctx; the input fields are overrides for hosts that don't surface them on ctx, or for callers that want to derive a key for an off-host (runId, nodeId) pair.

payload.description: Request-shape payload mixed into the SHA-256. Any JSON-serializable value (object, array, string, number, boolean, null). The same payload always produces the same key — that is the point.

runId.description: Override for ctx.runId. Honored only in composite mode.

nodeId.description: Override for ctx.nodeId. Honored only in composite mode.
